name: NanoVMs
description: Commercial unikernel platform running applications as secure isolated VMs up to 300% faster than containers on major clouds.

seo.title: NanoVMs — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: NanoVMs: Commercial unikernel platform running applications as secure isolated VMs up to 300% faster than containers on major clouds.

when_to_use: Unikernel deployment running apps as isolated secure VMs
Up to 3x faster app performance vs containers on major clouds
Minimal attack surface runtime for security-sensitive services
Replacing Docker containers with lightweight unikernel VMs
Instant VM boot for serverless-like app isolation patterns

pros: Smaller attack surface than full VMs
review.verdict: Genuinely fast and secure unikernel tech, but container inertia makes adoption a hard sell.
review.best_for: Security-focused teams willing to invest in unikernel tooling for specific workloads
review.not_for: Mainstream teams happy with containers or needing broad ecosystem compatibility

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium tier, no explicit peak-lock evidence

lock_in.reason: Unikernel builds portable, runs on any cloud

developer_experience.reason: Decent CLI and docs, niche tech
